title: Haunted Tree negates opponent magic

card.rawText: Play this card from your hand when your opponent plays a magic card. Negate the card effect and instead send it to the cemetery.

effect.value: Negate effect and send to cemetery

plan.title: Haunted Tree negates opponent magic
plan.summary: Respond to opponent magic with Haunted Tree and verify the triggering magic is negated and sent to cemetery.

notes: Haunted Tree is in player_1 hand.
Player_2 plays a standard magic card to open the response window.

steps: Player_1 plays Haunted Tree from hand as the Lightning response.
Resolve chain and verify the original magic is negated.
manualVerification: Verify against card text: Play this card from your hand when your opponent plays a magic card. Negate the card effect and instead send it to the cemetery.
